calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2019 Continued To Oct-23-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Judgment By Default By Court
Off Calendar Sep-05-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants GALCA Group LLC and Jose Guillermo Alcantar, individually.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Adriana Robles, CSR #14212. Telephone: 415-551-0332. Email: arobles@sftc.org.

Catherine Ann Schlomann, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Flexible Funding LTD. Liability Co.
Paul DeLuca, Managing Member for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants GALCA Group LLC or Jose Guillermo Alcantar, individually.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Contract, Money Had & Received and Converson was filed on October 12, 2018.
Substitute service on defendant GALCA Group LLC occurred on October 29, 2018 and was effectuated on November 8, 2018.
Substitute service on defendant Jose Guillermo Alcantar, individually, occurred on December 11, 2018 and was effectuated on December 21, 2018.
Default as to defendants GALCA Group LLC and Jose Guillermo Alcantar, individually, was entered on February 8, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on February 28, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Flexible Funding LTD. Liability Co., and against the default defendants GALCA Group LLC and Jose Guillermo Alcantar, individually, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $972,925.03.
Prejudgment Interest - $210,198.80.
Attorney Fees - $111,081.00.
Costs - $1,641.96.

Total - $1,295,846.79.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Motion For Judgment By Default By Court
Off Calendar Aug-06-2019 Continued To Sep-05-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Motion To Compel Responses To Subpoena And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-05-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Catherine Robertsonb, Esq. 408-918-2835 of Pahl & McCay for Plaintiff through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

Party stipulates to the Judge Pro Tem.

RULING - A R G U E D. Te proof of Service is Discussed. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF FLEXIBLE FUNDING LTD LIABILITY CO.'s Motion To Compel Responses To Subpoena And For Monetary Sanctions.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling with modification.

Motion to compel response to subpoena is denied without Prejudice to being refiled. The proof of service for the subpoena sought to be enforced is unsigned and otherwise incomplete.

Judge Pro Tem: Sigrid Irias, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2019 Continued To Sep-18-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To Subpoena And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-20-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Catherine Robertson, Esq. 408-918-2835 of Pahl & McCay for Plaintiff through Court Call.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF FLEXIBLE FUNDING LTD LIABILITY CO.'s Motion To Compel Responses To Subpoena And For Monetary Sanctions.

Denied without Prejudice. Plaintiff may refile to serve third party.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
